Reference: 1. All PLL bypass caps (C9 C10 C19 C37 C42) MUST be C0G/NP0 dielectric — X7R noise is unacceptable
2. DDR4 bypass caps (C63-C70) must be matched ±5% and placed symmetrically
3. PMIC output bulk caps (C59-C62) must be within 3mm of PMIC output pin
4. AWR2944 RF supply caps (C1-C3 C11-C13) must be via-in-pad directly under BGA
5. RK3588S requires minimum 6× 100nF + 2× 10µF on VDD_CPU — do not reduce
6. Ferrite beads FB1 must separate digital VCC_3V3 from analog VDDA sections
